title: Investigations and reports
doc_html:
§1653.  Investigations and reports

The Board of Parole, upon request of the Governor, may make investigations and reports to assist the Governor in making decisions relative to granting pardons and reprieves.  

Added by Acts 1960, No. 374, §3.
doc_text:
§1653.  Investigations and reports
The Board of Parole, upon request of the Governor, may make investigations and reports to assist the Governor in making decisions relative to granting pardons and reprieves.
Added by Acts 1960, No. 374, §3.
